title: paspalidium elegantulum
intro: Paspalidium elegantulum, also known as the blue grass or elegant blue grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of P. elegantulum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of P. elegantulum typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
